column1: Hey Allyson, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you looking to book?
wordd punta cana is lit lol, its where i go every year
how many ppl in your group
wordd thats solid! we all from the same school?
dope which school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
nicee we had a few groups from FAU last year, y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Laughed at “nicee we had a few groups from FAU last year, y'all def know how to party lol”
Aiming to get things booked this week or next week
ok cool, i'll send what i have now but keep in mind prices change quickly this time of year. I'll add in a payment plan, lets you secure your spot then gives some time to pay off the rest
cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send it to?
just sent lmk if you got it
I have not gotten it yet
ok do you mind checkin your all mail tab/spam? I'll resend it but sometimes gets sent ther
cooool let me know what everyone thinks
yes ill get back to you soon!
Hey it says on the payment on the top 2025 is that normal?
hey yea so thats a sample quote so you can see pricing. the actual payment dates are the ones in the email body under the Payment Plan section
Liked “hey yea so thats a sample quote so you can see pricing. the actual payment dates are the ones in the email body under the Payment Plan section”
And then just to clarify, for the Occidental it would be $646 per person per room not in total?
hey sorry was offline, but yea its per person
What would be the check in time on march 7th and time for check out for march 11?
check in is at 3 but if rooms are ready when you arrive youre able to check in. if theyre not, you can stll use the resort, eat, drink, pool, etc until rooms are ready
yea. same deal tho, you can still use the resort until its time to get on your shuttle to the airport. will just need to be out of you room
Loved “yea. same deal tho, you can still use the resort until its time to get on your shuttle to the airport. will just need to be out of you room”
So would the first payment technically be due today?
Is the $200 deposit included in the $646 or is that just a deposit to book our stay between us 4?
yea the $200 is per person and goes towards the 646. so the remaining balance in 2 weeks will be 446
and today would be to lock in the current rate and the free booze cruise
Current rate as in tomorrow it could go up higher?
more so means regardless if it went up today, I'd still be able to honor this rate
heyy Allyson whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we want to roll with?
hi yes we've been looking at occidental punta cana sorry we're just trying to have everyone agreement rn
okay yea will be dope to have y'all there, ill be there
are some people not agreeing on the spot or just on spring break overall?
Hey quick question do you work with Justcollege or gobluetours?
yea we work directly with Go Blue Tours! Go Blue is our operator
Juscollege we don't collaborate with much
Ive been trying to call the main line for gobluetours the past 3 days and emailed but no one got back to me. Tbh i did not realize you worked directly with gobluetours
Ah! did you want to get on a call? I'm avail this afternoon
hey number I called from is 8886032937. just a heads up. will call again in a few
just to clarify with payment we can pay separately with our account correct?
Could our rooms be next to each other or at least on the same floor?

so the physical room location is assigned at the time of check in based on what the resort has available with their other reservations, check outs, clean rooms ready, etc. during check in tho you can always request they are near eachother, same floor, same building, etc and they will accommodate based on what they have
our onsite staff can help you ask for that as well
I tried to log into my account and it says my booking is inactive
Actually nvm i would have to make a whole new reservation because of the rooms
We would be able to book this tonight, just waiting on a yes from one person. Is that possible to work with you tonight to make the booking? So we can even out the numbers?
you had a reservation previously? it mustve expired
I'll update the one you just started
Yeah i made a 4 person one, but it doesn't matter now because we are doing 3 person room and 2 person
would you be able to update it to that everyone owes $692.40 on each account?
yea should be all set now. just emailed over the link
same one you just opened up
okay thank you let me look
so yeah still waiting on one but we will for sure book it tonight
Does the address on the booking have to be the one on our passport?
And also whats the refund policy?
Nah it doesnt have to be the same, and if you think theres a chance you may cancel you'll want to add the travel protection insurance. you'll see prompts on how to add it in during your first payment
Okay so if we do not add travel insurance then its nonrefundable correct?
Is springbreaku the same thing as gobluetours?
Yes we're basically all one organization
Loved “Yes we're basically all one organization”
Once we put the deposit down would we get a confirmation email?
yea you'll get payment confirmation emails, and another about how to add the travel protection insurance
I can also see on my end and can confirm for you
Liked “I can also see on my end and can confirm for you”
Hey so the fifth person backed out
Im sorry, so we would do 1 four person room again
Is there anyway we could update the reservation again im sorry
Once that changes the four of us will be on board! So deposit would be due tn?
okay cool so you 4 are back at the $646 rate across the board. in one room
hey were y'all able to get onto the reservation?
Yes we're going to put the deposit down today
sounds good, if y'all need anything just lmk
Do we just log into our account and pay the deposit through there?
The travel insurance covers trip cancellation and medical correct?
Do uk if the travel insurance covers flights?
I'm not to sure, the insurance is from a partner company called Travel insure, so when you go to purchase it they'll give you all the info on whats included/pricing ect
Liked “I'm not to sure, the insurance is from a partner company called Travel insure, so when you go to purchase it they'll give you all the info on whats included/pricing ect”
So by putting the $200 deposit down that means are room is officially booked correct?

My flight has 2 confirmation codes since im flying 2 different airlines there and back. For the flight info on our accounts do we just put the confirmation code for the flight when we arrive? Im sorry i dont know if that makes sense
Yea yup! means your reserved and secured with a slot, but the full booking is complete after the final payment
Okay so after the final payment we'll have the confirmation for the whole booking sent to our emails correct?
For arrival info put the leg of the flight that is landing at the destination. For departure, the one that's leaving the destination
You can split the arrival and departure entries
it says my outbound and return flight is the same confirmation codes but they're two different codes. There was no option to fill out another confirmation codes for return flight
Are you able to manually enter the departure time?
Sorry I can't see what you see so hard for me to say exactly what to do
Yes i filled out the flight info and times arriving and returning. Just both of the confirmation codes are the same, it did not give me an option to put my returning flights confirmation code
Okay, I'll check on that. As long as the correct times are in there for your departure you'll be good
Liked “Okay, I'll check on that. As long as the correct times are in there for your departure you'll be good”
Hi spiffy! Jw if there is anything else we need to do within our accounts besides pay the final balance feb 3?

Just the flight info and passport info! once the final balance is made we'll start the pre departure process where our ops team goes in, reports everything, releases your vouchers, confirmation codes, etc
okay i already filled out my flight info and passport i'm not sure about the others yet
Cool yea if you wanna let the others know they can start to do that as well, whenever they can
hey spiffy, i keep getting insurance alerts sent to my email by gobluetours, but I put my travel insurance on my account already
hey all good. ill make a note of that to the team to make sure ppl arent getting emails that have already uploaded it to their acct
I just wanted to make sure it was documented for me
Hi spiffy I got the alert again for my insurance
sheeessh I told the team about that too the other day
Hey spiffy, just wanted to make sure if there is anything else we need to do before our trip?
hey sorry I missed this! but you guys are all good! You'll be receiving your pre departure email soon with all the info you need
Liked “hey sorry I missed this! but you guys are all good! You'll be receiving your pre departure email soon with all the info you need”
Hey spiffy! I just received ur email. All of us filled out the flight info, however the email said some of us didn't?
hey apologies on that you can disregard the flight part it was a general piece sent to all of our groups. if you got it in youre all good!
were you thinkin about adding any of the party pass events?
Loved “hey apologies on that you can disregard the flight part it was a general piece sent to all of our groups. if you got it in youre all good!”
i don't think so, thank you though
Also so when you send us the vouchers we need to print it out and bring with us correct?

Also for my account flight info for my return flight it says arrival time 12:00am even though on my app it says 7:30pm and everyone else in my group says 7:30pm. Is there a way i can change that? It says i can't edit my flight within 14 days of my trip.
I'll update that for you. the good thing is, only the departure time matter for transportation from the resort to the airport. as long as thats good, youre good
and yea you can print them out or screenshot on your phone
Liked “I'll update that for you. the good thing is, only the departure time matter for transportation from the resort to the airport. as long as thats good, youre good”
of course. lookin forward to havin y'all out there with us
Loved “of course. lookin forward to havin y'all out there with us”
safe travels! see y'all out here soon
Liked “safe travels! see y'all out here soon”
hi spiffy we're here where's the music at?😹
lmao in like an hour by the pool. DJs are setting up soon
and then we also having a block party by the lobby later on
Im at steakhouse restaurant are you going to the club later?
